final:
module edge_detector(
    input clk,
    input signal_in,
    output reg edge_detected
);
    reg last_signal_in;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (signal_in && !last_signal_in) begin edge_detected <= 1'b1 ; // Rising edge detected end else begin edge_detected <= 1'b0 ; // No edge
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  last_signal_in <= signal_in ;
  end
endmodule
